_comment: OpenAI Codex CLI adapter for searchoclock-core.
Codex CLI's PostToolUse hook also runs after Bash commands that exit non-zero and includes tool_response,
so it is the failure surface. The handler pipes the event JSON to `socx hook`; socx self-gates on failure.
VERIFY the exact hooks.json schema + field names against https://developers.openai.com/codex/hooks (2026)
before relying on this — Codex's hook payload shape may differ from the normalized keys socx reads
(socx accepts command/exit_code/stdout/stderr/error or a tool_response object).
Set SOCX_HARNESS=codex so the protocol names the harness.
